title: Time Design in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger time design in practice judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Time Design in Practice is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Time Design in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good time design in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Time Design in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
